scripts.ci:phase1: npm run check:server-contract && npm run check:server-auth && npm run check:server-request-contract && npm run check:phase1-smoke
scripts.test: npm run check:mobile-sync && npm run test -w presence-verifier && npm run test -w presence-sdk && npm run type-check -w presence-mobile && npm run type-check -w presence-test-app
scripts.check:server-release-readiness: npm run check:server-contract && npm run check:server-auth && npm run check:server-request-contract && PRESENCE_SMOKE_LOCAL=1 npm run check:runtime-smoke
